name: Emits evidence objects (every control has evidenceTypes from the 12-kind union)
summary: Every control declares a non-empty evidenceTypes array, with each entry drawn from the 12-kind EvidenceType union defined in packages/types/src/index.ts.
requirements: Every entry in Control.evidenceTypes is one of the 12 canonical EvidenceType values.
Lower-level invariants continue to pass (the framework still satisfies Levels 1 and 2).
